characters.name: Aaron Kelso
characters.description: Mr. KelsoBackground InformationFirst Appearance"My Funny Valentines"Latest Appearance"The Army-Navy Game"Character InformationFull nameAaron KelsoOther namesMr. KelsoGenderMaleAgeUnknown(presumably in his 60's)Year of BirthUnknown(presumably in the 1930s)PersonalityForgiving and FriendlyAppearanceCrimson-grey Jumper,grey trousers, grey balding hair and a mustache, half-moon specs, beige shirtOccupationOwner and shopkeeper atKelso'sAlignmentGoodHomeUnknown(presumablyThe Unnamed City)RelativesUnnamed wifeAaron Kelso, known toThe Recess Gangand the rest of theThird Street Schoolchildren as Mr. Kelso, is the friendly local shopkeeper of a corner store named 'Kelso's' which the children visit in numerous episodes. He is kind and often acts as a voice of advice and reason to the kids. His wife seems more interested in money than in advice, as she seems to henpeck him about turning away business in the name of morality.

characters.name: Adam Abel
characters.description: Adam AbelBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: All Growed DownCreated ByPaulandJoeVoiced ByMichael Shulman("King Gus")Justin Jon Ross ("Tattletale Heart")Justin Shenkarow ("Don't Ask Me")First Appearance"King Gus"Latest AppearanceRecess: All Growed DownCharacter InformationFull nameAdem AbelOther namesUnknownGenderMaleAge10-11 (in the series)11-12 (inRecess: Taking the Fifth Grade)Date of Birth1987AppearanceBlack hair, black beady-eyes, green shirt, red sweater-vest, brown pants, sneakersOccupationFifth (later Sixth) Grade Student atThird Street SchoolAlignmentGood Adam Abelis a background character inRecess. Adam is a background character in the show and does not have many speaking lines. In the episode "Tattletale Heart", his name is given out, and is the first kid in alphabetical order at the school, meaning that he has to go first for everything. This has made him comment: "Why couldn't I have been born Zedidius Zwick?"

characters.name: Angie (Spinelli's Grandmother)
characters.description: Angieis a recurring, rumored character inRecess, she is the maternal grandmother ofSpinelliandFlo's mother. She is estranged from her former best friendMuriel Finster; as seen in an old (circa. 1952) photograph in Finster's Apartment (specifically in her bedroom) in the episode "Weekend at Muriel's". In the episode, it is revealed that she is retiring from her unknown job and thatBoband Flo are going to her retirement party out of town and leave Spinelli in Miss Finster’s care.

characters.name: Antonio
characters.description: AntonioBackground InformationVoiced ByJess HarnellFirst Appearance"The Voice"(Only Appearance)Character InformationFull nameUnknownOther namesAntonioGenderMaleAgeUnknown(Presumably his 20s or 30s)Year of BirthUnknown(Presumably the 1970s and 1980s)PersonalityJolly, musical, handsome and smartOccupationOpera Tenor SingerAlignmentGoodHomeCosta Rica(originally)RelativesUnnamed parentsMiss Salamone(Fiancé)AlliesMiss SalamoneLikesSinging, Music, his fiancéeAntoniois a one-shot character in the episode "The Voice". He is a Costa Rican opera tenor singer andMiss Salamone's fiancé. WhenMikeyfinds they are now engaged, he felt very distraught and left the music room. Antonio wonders if it is something he sang (he did so while greeting him). During the middle of "The Voice", Antonio engaged Miss Salamone to be his fiancé at the music room after his return from Costa Rica, which made Mikey hurt his feelings due to his crush development on Miss Salamone.

characters.name: Ashley Armbruster
characters.description: Ashley ArmbrusterBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: School's OutRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeRecess: All Growed DownCreated ByPaul GermainJoe AnsolabehereVoiced ByAnndi McAfeeFirst Appearance"The Experiment"(Unnamed)"Jinxed"(Named)Latest AppearanceRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeCharacter InformationFull nameAshley ArmbrusterOther namesAshley A.Powderpuff(BySpinelli)GenderFemaleAge910 (Recess: School's Out&Recess: Taking the Fifth Grade)Year of Birth1988PersonalityGirly, snobby, mean, spoiled, bratty, vainAppearanceMedium sized, young, tall, pink head band, straight honey blonde(bright yellow-blonde in digitally-animated episodes and movies)hair, black and pink outfitOccupationFourth(later fifth)Grade Student atThird Street SchoolNeutral friend toThe Recess GangLeader ofthe AshleysAffiliationsThe AshleysAlignmentNeutral/GoodRelativesUnnamed parentsTyler Armbruster(Younger brother)Brittany Armbruster(Younger sister)PetsMuffin(A cat, appears in "Operation Stuart")AlliesThe AshleysThe Recess Gang(sometimes)The Library KidEnemiesThe Recess Gang(sometimes)LikesMakeovers, fashion, dresses, tea, dolls, looking pretty, making fun of others, popularityDislikesNot getting her way, losing, being tricked, not being girly Ashley Armbruster(a.k.a.Ashley A.) is the leader ofthe Ashleysin the seriesRecess.Her signature color is pink. Ashley A. is a spoiled, bratty, shallow, girly, beautiful, but mean nine-year-old rich girl. She is primarily interested in fashion and gossip. Ashley met the rest of the Ashleys one day when they were in kindergarten at a park where all their hats, they have been wearing were blown off their heads and when they went to get them, they bumped into each other and introduced themselves, becoming best friends. Because they were all wearing purple that day, it became a tradition among the girls to all wear purple on the anniversary of the day they first met, thus calling it "purple day". Ashley A. was once kicked out of the clique for accidentally forgetting to wear purple, though returned at the end of the episode.

characters.name: Artie Kid
characters.description: Artie KidBackground InformationCreated ByPaulandJoeFirst Appearance"Stand Up Randall"Latest Appearance"Mundy, Mundy"Character InformationFull nameThe Artie KidOther namesArtie KidGenderMaleAge7-8Date of BirthUnknownYear of Birth1990PersonalityQuite reserved, creative, talentedAppearanceDark skin, medium-length black hair, a French beret, painter's scrubs, a red t-shirtOccupationSecond (later Third) Grade Student atThird Street SchoolAdmirer of ArtAffiliationsThird Street SchoolRelativesUnknown Artie Kid, orThe Artie Kid, is a student ofThird Street Schooland a minor, recurring character inDisney'sRecess. He draws great drawings on the playground, though he does not have any speaking roles, he is seen talking to Randall in an argument about him snitching on him for drawing on the playground byGus.

characters.name: Ashley Boulet
characters.description: Ashley BouletBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: School's OutRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeCreated ByPaul GermainJoe AnsolabehereVoiced ByFrancesca SmithFirst Appearance"The Experiment"(Unnamed)"Jinxed"(Named)Latest AppearanceRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeCharacter InformationFull nameAshley BouletOther namesAshley B.GenderFemaleAge910 (Recess: School's Out&Recess: Taking the Fifth Grade)Year of Birth1988PersonalityVain, snobby, spoiled, prissy, sarcasticAppearanceSlender, curly black hair, yellow barret, white shirt, yellow cardigan/sweater, yellow necklace, yellow checkered skirt, long white socks, black mary-jane shoesOccupationFourth(later fifth)Grade Student atThird Street SchoolSecond-in-command ofthe Ashleys.AffiliationsThe AshleysAlignmentNeutral/GoodRelativesUnnamed parentsTyler Boulet(Younger brother)Brittany Boulet(Younger sister)AlliesThe AshleysEnemiesThe Recess Gang(sometimes)Randall J. WeemsLikesFashion, boys, makeup, beauty, getting her wayDislikesNot getting her wayAshley Boulet(a.k.a.Ashley B.) is the second-in-command ofthe AshleysinRecess. Her signature color is yellow. LiketheotherAshleys, Ashley B. is just as snobby and is considerably more sarcastic and prissy than the other girls. She is primarily interested in fashion and gossip. She met the other Ashleys one day in kindergarten at a playground, where all their hats were blown off their heads, and when they tried to get them, they bumped into each other and introduced themselves, becoming friends. Since then, the anniversary of when they first met has been known as "Purple Day", as the girls all wore purple when they met, and thus only purple can be worn on "Purple Day". WhenAshley A. accidentally forgot to wear purple on that day (as shown in "Outcast Ashley"), Ashley B. kicked her out of the clique and quickly took over the leadership position. Though by the end of the episode, they made up. Ashley B. is considered the closest toAshley A., as they are usually seen together more often than the other Ashleys. She has also shown to be quite nice in certain situations as well.

characters.name: Ashley Tomassian
characters.description: Ashley TomassianBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: School's OutRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeVoiced ByCamille Winbush(Half ofSeason 1)Ashley Johnson(remainder)Rachel Crane(Recess: School's Out)First Appearance"The New Kid"(Unnamed)"Jinxed"(Named)Latest AppearanceRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeCharacter InformationFull nameAshley TomassianOther namesAshley T.GenderFemaleAge9-10Date of BirthUnknownYear of Birth1988PersonalityGirly, snobby, smart, mean, spoiled, a bit clumsy, quietAppearanceTall, slender, lighter brown skin, curly brunette(medium-brown in digitally-animated episodes and movies)hair, thick eyebrows, almond-shaped eyes, dark green sweater with lighter sleeves and a darker collar, a dark green skirt, thigh length light green socks with darker green trim, dark brown loafersOccupationFourth(later Fifth)Grade Student atThird Street SchoolMember ofthe AshleysAlignmentNeutral/GoodAffiliationsThe AshleysRelativesUnnamed parentsTyler Tomassian(younger brother)Brittany Tomassian(younger sister)AlliesThe AshleysEnemiesThe Recess Gang(sometimes)Secret Service Look-Alike Foot SoldiersLikesMakeovers, fashion, dresses, tea, dolls, looking prettyDislikesNot getting her wayAshley Tomassian(a.k.a.Ashley T.) is a member ofthe Ashleys. Her signature color is green. Unlike the other Ashleys, she is very quiet and rarely talks and follows more than others. However, like the other Ashleys, she is considered to be snobby. She can also be a bit goofy and clumsy at times and is considered to be the smartest of the clique. Similar totheotherAshleys, she lives with both of her parents.Her mother, who has only been seen in "Parents' Night", has been shown to look and act very similarly to her. She has a seven-year-old brother named Tyler, who is a member of the similar rich boy clique, the Tylers and a five-year-old sister named Brittany, who appears in a clique with the Brittanys.

characters.name: Barry
characters.description: BarryBackground InformationFirst Appearance"Jinxed"Latest Appearance"Some Friend"Character InformationFull nameUnknownOther namesBarryGenderMaleAge10/11Year of Birth1987AppearanceSlender, fair skin, blond hair, pointy nose, purple jumper, a white shirt, glassesOccupationFifth (later Sixth) Student atThird Street SchoolAlignmentGoodAlliesRandallMenloScribe KidBarryis a male student ofThird Street Schoolwho is tall and thin in appearance. He bears a striking resemblance toKnarf, the leader ofThe Pale Kids. Barry is a friend ofRandall,Menlo, andScribe Kidas shown in episodes like "Soccer Boy" and "Some Friend", where they are all seen hanging out together. Hewears a purple jumper, a white shirt, and glasses. He has a rather long, pointy nose.

characters.name: Becky Benson
characters.description: Becky BensonBackground InformationVoiced ByTara StrongFirst Appearance"A Science Fair to Remember"(Only Appearance)Character InformationFull nameBecky BensonOther namesBeckyGenderFemaleAge7/8Year of Birth1990PersonalitySmart, sweet, quite manipulativeAppearanceShort, slender, long and brunette hair in low pigtails, round glasses, black dotted eyes, fair skin, a yellow t-shirt, a green skirt, brown shoesOccupationSecond (later Third) Grade Student atThird Street SchoolAlignmentGoodAlliesGretchen GrundlerBecky Bensonis a second-grade student atThird Street School. Becky is a young genius who looks up toGretchenas a big sister. She appears to be sweet and innocent on the outside, but is actually quite manipulative and scheming on the inside. After Gretchen shows her plans for the science fair, Becky steals them when she is not around and does not sign Gretchen up for the science fair. However, as smart as she is, she is not as smart as Gretchen, as she did not think to look at the research behind the project. Becky is a short, slender girl with long and brunette hair in low pigtails. She wears a yellow t-shirt, a green skirt, and brown shoes. She also wears round glasses. LikeGus, she is drawn with black dots for eyes instead of having white eyes with black pupils like mostRecesscharacters.

characters.name: Becky Detweiler
characters.description: Becky DetweilerBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: School's OutRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeCreated ByPaul GermainJoe AnsolabehereVoiced ByMelissa Joan Hart(Recess: School's Out)Tara Strong(Recess: Taking the Fifth Grade)First Appearance"Prince Randall"(Mention)Recess: School's OutLatest AppearanceRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeCharacter InformationOther namesBeckyGenderFemaleAge16-18Year of Birth1980sOccupationHigh school/college studentFloppy Burger employeeAlignmentGood/NeutralGoalTo finish high schoolCook for Floppy BurgerFoil Dr. Benedicts Plans(succeeded)RelativesEllie Detweiler(Mother)Sam Detweiler(Father)T.J. Detweiler(younger brother)AlliesMelissaJimmySallyNatalieEnemiesT.J. and his friends(Sometimes)Phillium Benedictand his employeesLikesJimmy, talking to her friends on the phoneDislikesT.J. annoying herFateMends her bond with T.J.(temporarily), continues her job at Floppy Burger, and enters her last year of high schoolRebecca"Becky"DetweilerisT.J. Detweiler's sixteen-to-eighteen-year-old sister and a supporting character inRecess: School's Out. Sam Detweiler(Father)T.J. Detweiler(younger brother) Becky is T.J.'s sarcastic yet beautiful big sister. While she is nice to her friends and parents, she can be rather mean and rude to her younger brother and his friends. While Becky finds T.J. an annoyance, deep down, she cares about him. T.J. is roughly at the height of her collar in the movie. InRecess: School's Out, T.J. makes her drive across the state multiple times to pick up and drop off his friends from their camps in order for them to help him with his plan, or else he will post her diary on the internet. Once T.J. is captured, the rest ofThe Recess Gangtry to get her to help him, with her refusing. She finally decides to help them onceMikeytells her that she needs to save T.J. because he is her little brother and needs her. She then drives the gang to pick up their campmates, and she helps out in the battle against the villains. After the fight, T.J. gives back her diary and she tells him that maybe he is not such a bad little brother after all. Despite her mending her ways with T.J. at the end ofRecess: School's Out, she goes back to being mean and rude to him and his friends inRecess: Taking the Fifth Grade. However, this may be due to keeping up appearances and they may still get along.

characters.name: Bertha
characters.description: BerthaBackground InformationVoiced ByTress MacNeilleFirst Appearance"The New Kid"Character InformationFull nameBerthaGenderFemaleOccupationSchool Bus Driver forThird Street SchoolAlignmentGoodBerthais a female bus driver who drives buses forThird Street School.She has appeared in multiple episodes, even being part of the main storyline on one occasion. She drives a yellow school bus that she has nicknamed "Old Smokey", which is seen taking the children on a field trip in "Operation Field Trip". In the episode, the school bus breaks down on a count of it being really old and used which upsets Bertha greatly. The kids, led byGretchenandSpinelli, use parts that are laying around to fix the broken-down bus which is seen to be working better than ever.

characters.name: Bob Spinelli
characters.description: Bob SpinelliBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: School's OutCreated ByPaul GermainJoe AnsolabehereVoiced BySam McMurrayFirst Appearance"Parents' Night"Latest AppearanceRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeCharacter InformationFull nameRobert SpinelliOther namesBobDadGenderMaleAgeUnknown; maybe in his late 30s to early 40s.Year of BirthUnknown; maybe in the late 1950s.OccupationSecret Government AgentAlignmentGoodAffiliationsAshley SpinelliFlo SpinelliThe Spinelli FamilyPTAThe GangHomeThe Spinellis' House,Unnamed CityRelativesFlo(Wife)Joey(Son)Vito(Son)Spinelli(Daughter)Gordy(Nephew)Angie(Mother-in-Law)Dave(Father-in-Law)Ashley(Either Aunt or Aunt-in-Law)Manny(Brother or Brother-in-Law)Bob Spinelliis a minor, recurring character inRecess. He is the father ofAshley Spinelliand the husband ofFlo Spinelli. Like his daughter, Ashley, Bob has a love of pro-wrestling, and has a tradition of watching it at dinner with his daughter and wife on the television. Bob is secretly a government agent, code-named "006", though this is only ever touched upon at the end of "Parents' Night".  Bob Spinellion Internet Movie Database

characters.name: Brandon the Singer
characters.description: Brandon PiracidoBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: School's OutVoiced ByMichael ShulmanFirst Appearance"The Voice"Latest AppearanceRecess: School's OutCharacter InformationFull nameBrandon PlacidoOther namesBrandon the SingerThe Singer KidGenderMaleAge9-10Year of Birth1988AppearanceGinger slicked-back hair, red dinner-jacket, a white dress shirt, along with a green cravat, blue dress pants classical men's black shoes, a green ascotOccupationFourth (later Fifth) Student atThird Street SchoolAlignmentGoodRelativesUnnamed ParentsAlliesHis backup crewEnemiesBees(possibly)LikesSingingDislikesBeesBrandon Placido, also known asThe Singer Kid, is the prized vocal performer atThird Street School. He often sings instead of speaking, much to the annoyance of his fellow students, to the point where they cheered when he swallowed a bee, and he was stung in the voice-box and was not able to sing for a while. In some episodes, he gets picked on by other students due to his always singing everything he says. For example, in the episode "Tattletale Heart", Brandon sings "These shoes were new!", when food hits his shoes during the food fight. Mirroring the look of classical musicians, albeit more colorful, he wears a red dinner-jacket, a white dress shirt with gold cufflinks, along with a green cravat, golden tie pin and blue pleated dress pants. He appears to be wearing classical men's black Oxford shoes. His hair is slicked-back.

Mirroring the look of classical musicians, albeit more colorful, he wears a red dinner-jacket, a white dress shirt with gold cufflinks, along with a green cravat, golden tie pin and blue pleated dress pants. He appears to be wearing classical men's black Oxford shoes. His hair is slicked-back.

characters.name: Brock
characters.description: Brockis a Caucasian kid with brown hair who was theA.V. Kid(i.e., the in-charge of the technology) atThird Street Schoolbefore handing over his keys toLance the Pantsbecause he had to move to Portugal. He was originally chosen to be the A.V. Kid in 3rd grade. Tradition said that one cannot be an A.V. Kid until 4th grade, but they made an exception for him. He was probably the best A.V. Kid in Third Street School. After he handed over his resignation, The Faculty gave him the responsibility of choosing the new A.V Kid. He is voiced byScott McAfee.  Media:Recess(Episode List)  •Recess: School's Out•Recess: All Growed Down•Recess: Taking the Fifth Grade•Recess Christmas: Miracle on Third Street

characters.name: Buster
characters.description: Busteris a fifth (later sixth) grade student ofThird Street Schooland a friend ofLawson's. He is a jock and a bully, much like Lawson's other cronies. He is tall and slender. He has sports spiky auburn hair and fair skin. He wears a blue shirt with two red stripes. In the episode "Bad Hair Day," he was desperate to get the 'Mikey' haircut as he was going to his cousin's wedding but did not actually get the haircut. He was the only one who didn't get it, apart fromSpinelliandGretchenwho were absent from school.

characters.name: Butch
characters.description: ButchBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: Taking the Fifth Grade(Cameo)Voiced ByKath SoucieFirst Appearance"The Experiment"Latest AppearanceRecess: Taking the Fifth GradeCharacter InformationGenderMaleAge10-11Date of BirthUnknownYear of Birth1987AppearanceBrown hair with a white streak, dark gray T-shirt, blue jeans, brown shoes, black leather jacket, and a toothpick in his mouthOccupationResident Horror StorytellerBearer of Bad NewsThird Street Schoolfifth(later sixth)grade studentAlignmentGoodRelativesUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherJoey(Older Brother)Butchis the bearer of bad news and the one who usually tells the scary stories from his older brother's school days, oftentimes as a warning against something the gang would be trying to do at the time. Butch has a rather gloomy personality, which befits his position as the one who tells scary stories. It is implied that he became that way because of him seeing his brother kiss a girl. He also seems to take pleasure in scaring people for some reason, but he does not seem like a mean person, either. He is also very intelligent, as he helps the gang piece together scattered pieces of evidence when the balls were recalled, although it's relatively unknown whether he is friendly with the gang or not. Butch is usually seen in a dark gray T-shirt, blue jeans, brown shoes, a black leather jacket, and a toothpick in his mouth. His most striking feature is a white streak in his brown hair that he got in the same incident (as fear can cause hair to go white) that may have shaped his current personality. Before the incident, he had normal brown hair, and a simple outfit of a beige shirt, brown pants, and presumably the same shoes.

characters.name: Butler (The C-Note)
characters.description: Butler (The C-Note)is a minor, one-shot character in the episode "The C-Note". He is thebutlerforThaddeus T. Third the V; his voice was provided for byJeff Bennett.

characters.name: Captain Bradley
characters.description: Captain BradleyBackground InformationFeature filmsRecess: School's OutVoiced ByErik von Detten(Remainder)Toran Caudell("The Ratings Game")First Appearance"Officer Mikey"Latest AppearanceRecess: School's OutCharacter InformationFull nameUnknownOther namesCaptain BradleyCaptain BradGenderMaleAge11/12 (main series)12-13 (Recess taking on the fifth grade)Year of Birth1986PersonalityMean, strict, rudeAppearanceSlender, tall, blond hair, peach skin, a green uniform with an orange belt and a black necktie, black shoesOccupationLeader of the Safety Rangers and Sixth Grade Student ofThird Street SchoolAlignmentNeutralAffiliationsSafety RangersHomeUnknown(presumablyThe Unnamed City)RelativesUnnamed ParentsAlliesMembers of Safety RangersCaptain Bradley, orCaptain Brad, is the leader of theSafety Rangers. He is very mean, grouchy, strict, and rude. He can often be rude and even make fun of people by laughing at them. He also appeared in the episode "The Ratings Game", in which he insultedMenloby calling him a loser upon discovery of his low rating. InRecess: School's Out, he was in charge of the military camp whichGusattended for the summer.

characters.name: Captain Sticky
characters.description: Captain StickyBackground InformationVoiced ByRyan O'Donohue("To Finster with Love")E.G. Daily("The Legend of Big Kid" onwards)First Appearance"The Break In"(unspeaking)"To Finster with Love"(speaking)Character InformationFull nameUnknownOther namesCaptain StickyGenderMaleAge56 (Recess: School's Out&Recess: Taking the Fifth Grade)Year of Birth1992OccupationThird Street Schoolkindergarten (later First Grade) studentLeader ofthe kindergartnersAlignmentGoodAffiliationsThe KindergartnersRelativesUnnamed ParentsAlliesCindyTubbyHectorVarious other kindergartnersThe Recess Gang(sometimes)EnemiesMost of the "big kids"Captain Stickyis the leader ofthe kindergartnersinRecess. Being the leader of the kindergartners, Sticky is the one who leads the others in their antics. Like the other kindergartners, he is hyper and loud, and often chases after the other kids. Despite this, he is on good terms withT.J. Detweilerand his friends. He was entered in the Kindergarten Derby bythe Ashleys. He remains the leader of the kindergartners untilRecess: All Growed Down, where he passes on his leadership duties toHectorfor standing up to Chief Stinky, a mean new kindergartner who took over.

characters.name: Chad LaSalle
characters.description: Chad LaSalleBackground InformationCreated ByPaul GermainJoe AnsolabehereVoiced ByKenny BlankFirst Appearance"Big Brother Chad"Latest Appearance"Copycat Kid"Character InformationFull nameChad LaSalleGenderMaleAge13/14Year of Birth1984RelativesMr. LaSalle(father)Mrs. LaSalle(mother)Vince LaSalle(younger brother)PetsUnnamed TurtleAlliesFurldyEnemiesCy KowalskiChad LaSalleisVince's older brother who appears in "Big Brother Chad". He is said to be the most popular boy at his school by Vince. Chad is in 8th grade and attends at middle school. He is one of of the "Future Geeks of America" and is the score-keeper in his school's Baseball team. He is in Chess Club and was once the Chess Champ. When he comes to pick Vince up from school, he is shown to be a geek to everyone but Vince, who found it out later in the episode. However, Chad knows that he is a geek, and is proud of it. Later in the episode he stood up toCy Kowalski,Chucko's big brother, Cy and Chad knew each other from school and Cy was going to beat Vincent but was afraid of Chad threatening not to tutor him. Because Chad used to help him out with his math homework, Cy feared that he would fail as they were starting Algebra soon. After the bully agree to back off Vincent realize the Chad is actually cool in another way.

Because Chad used to help him out with his math homework, Cy feared that he would fail as they were starting Algebra soon. After the bully agree to back off Vincent realize the Chad is actually cool in another way.

characters.name: Cheay
characters.description: Cheayis a one ofLawson's friends inRecess. He is a fifth (later sixth) grader and a bully. He is also a jock like Lawson. He wears a backwards baseball cap and sunglasses.

characters.name: Cheay
characters.description: Cheayis a one ofLawson's friends inRecess. He is a fifth (later sixth) grader and a bully. He is also a jock like Lawson. He wears a backwards baseball cap and sunglasses.

characters.name: Chief Stinky
characters.description: Chief Stinkyis the newest kindergartner. He tookCaptain Sticky's place as the leader ofthe kindergartners. He bullied all of the other kindergartens until,Hectordefeats him and became the new leader of the kindergartners. Chief Stinky made his only appearance in the movieRecess: All Growed Downas the main antagonist. He was voiced byE.G. Daily. He has red hair and is bigger than the other kindergartners and carries a yard stick with a teddy bear's head tied to it. His lips are blue and one of his eyes is green. He has a red alien or jellyfish or skull with blue eyes.

characters.name: Chief Stinky

He has red hair and is bigger than the other kindergartners and carries a yard stick with a teddy bear's head tied to it. His lips are blue and one of his eyes is green. He has a red alien or jellyfish or skull with blue eyes.

characters.name: Chucko Kowalski
characters.description: ChuckoBackground InformationCreated ByPaulandJoeVoiced ByRoss Malinger("Big Brother Chad")Ryan O'Donohue("The Kid Came Back")Kenny Blank("Mundy, Mundy")First Appearance"Big Brother Chad"Character InformationFull nameChucko KowalskiOther namesChuckoGenderMaleAge10-11Date of Birth1987Year of Birth1987PersonalityBullyAppearanceTall, slender, blond hair, beige T-shirt with a brown stripe, brown pants, black sneakersOccupationFifth(later Sixth)Grade Student atThird Street SchoolRelativesCy(older brother)AlliesCheayLawsonKoreoJockoBusterEnemiesThe Recess GangLikesMarblesChucko Kowalskiis a fifth-grade bully and jock who is one ofLawson's friends atThird Street School. Chucko is one of the bullies of Third Street School and a member of Lawson's closest gang of friends. During the first season though, he was portrayed with Lawson's title as the school's meanest fifth grade bully. He has no problem picking on younger kids, and looks up to his older brother,Cy.Vinceis usually the one standing up for the kids he bullies, angering him. Aside from "Big Brother Chad", Chucko ended up not being a major bully for the rest of the series, and only appeared alongsideLawson, usually not speaking. Chucko is tall and slender. He has blond hair and wears a Beige T-shirt with a brown stripe across it, brown pants and black sneakers.

characters.name: Chucko Kowalski
characters.description: ChuckoBackground InformationCreated ByPaulandJoeVoiced ByRoss Malinger("Big Brother Chad")Ryan O'Donohue("The Kid Came Back")Kenny Blank("Mundy, Mundy")First Appearance"Big Brother Chad"Character InformationFull nameChucko KowalskiOther namesChuckoGenderMaleAge10-11Date of Birth1987Year of Birth1987PersonalityBullyAppearanceTall, slender, blond hair, beige T-shirt with a brown stripe, brown pants, black sneakersOccupationFifth(later Sixth)Grade Student atThird Street SchoolRelativesCy(older brother)AlliesCheayLawsonKoreoJockoBusterEnemiesThe Recess GangLikesMarblesChucko Kowalskiis a fifth-grade bully and jock who is one ofLawson's friends atThird Street School. Chucko is one of the bullies of Third Street School and a member of Lawson's closest gang of friends. During the first season though, he was portrayed with Lawson's title as the school's meanest fifth grade bully. He has no problem picking on younger kids, and looks up to his older brother,Cy.Vinceis usually the one standing up for the kids he bullies, angering him. Aside from "Big Brother Chad", Chucko ended up not being a major bully for the rest of the series, and only appeared alongsideLawson, usually not speaking. Chucko is tall and slender. He has blond hair and wears a Beige T-shirt with a brown stripe across it, brown pants and black sneakers.
